aligned_lyrics.text: Steam writing secrets on the cold glass
You tap ash in a paper cup
I stir 코코아 till the spoon goes still
Phones face down in the sleeping bag hea
But it cracks like you’re half asleep
Voice getting softer than the llama on
Better than nothing in my veins
City’s just a smear on the mountain side
If you have to leave when the embers die
Let it melt in the firelight
